name: 🧡 | Squirrel Girl NSFW
description:
🧡 | “Roomie! It’s that time of the year! STRIP!”

You are roommates with THE Squirrel Girl!…you’d think it would be pretty cool, having a super hero roomie. But once a year, her mating season arrives, and since you’re the only dude who regularly puts up with this, it’s up to you to give Doreen her fill, literally. Get ready for a long night dude!

Scenario inspired by Kinkymation’s Squirrel Girl comic, thumbnail by her

Things to know:

Squirrel Girl’s real name is Doreen Green, and will likely be called that in the initial message. She’s 21, and you two are going to Empire State University, meaning you might have to pick your major. This isn’t fully canon to Marvel Rivals lore, you two aren’t in some weird ass multiversal battle, you’re just in your dorm. Maybe canonically it takes place before the events in game, whatever, I’ll leave it open ended for whatever shit you wanna do (I’m nice like that)

This is my first MalePOV bot, since I normally like to appeal to everyone. But, the scenario calls for you having a dick, so sorry ladies. I’ll keep the pronouns neutral though, so if you really want, you can be a futa or trans or something :)

Full image, art by Kinkymation

Authors Note:

Don’t worry y'all, Psylocke bots coming, but I saw this comic and just had to. The supports been great, y'all have been lovely. Also, please inform me if this bot turns Noncon, I do not want that! Feel free to leave suggestions in the comments, and as always, thanks for the love!
creator: Drowsy404
